item.title: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 发布首款 Jalapeño 推理芯片
item.guid: OpenAI-与-Broadcom-发布首款-Jalapeño-推理芯片
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenAI and Broadcom jointly released the first-ever chip, "Jalapeño" (Mexican Pepper), designed for large language model inference tasks. OpenAI 昨日与 Broadcom 联合发布史上首颗芯片「Jalapeño」 (墨西哥辣椒)，面向大语言模型推理任务设计。

OpenAI stated that Jalapeño is the first generation of AI accelerators for their multi-generational computing platform. The chip architecture was designed from scratch by OpenAI based on their model roadmap, inference kernels, service systems, and product requirements, with Broadcom responsible for silicon implementation, networking, and connectivity technology, and Celestica participating in board, rack, and system integration. OpenAI 称，Jalapeño 是双方多代计算平台的第一代 AI 加速器。芯片架构由 OpenAI 基于模型路线图、推理 kernel、服务系统和产品需求从头设计，Broadcom 负责硅实现、网络和连接技术，Celestica 参与板卡、机柜和系统集成。

Key developments officially disclosed include: 官方披露的关键进展包括：

    Engineering samples have been running machine learning tasks in the lab at production target frequencies and power consumption, including GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark.

    Early tests show that Jalapeño's performance per watt is higher than current state-of-the-art levels, and a full performance technical report will be released in the coming months.

    The chip took only 9 months from initial design to manufacturing tape-out , which OpenAI says is one of the fastest ASIC development cycles in high-performance advanced semiconductors.

    The platform is planned to begin deployment by the end of 2026 and expand to multiple generations of products in subsequent years; Broadcom CEO Hock Tan stated that the platform will support the construction of gigawatt-scale data centers with data center partners such as Microsoft.

🔗 Related Reading: Breaking News | OpenAI Releases First Chip, Took Only Nine Months 🔗 相关阅读： 突发 ｜OpenAI 发布首款芯片，只花了九个月

item.title: Omdia：今年全球智能手机平均售价预计升至 3800 元
item.guid: Omdia：今年全球智能手机平均售价预计升至-3800-元
item.description:
Market research firm Omdia recently published a blog post, showing that the global smartphone market is undergoing a structural change this year with "falling volume and rising prices." Global smartphone shipments are expected to decline by 12.2% year-on-year to 1.093 billion units this year, a decrease of 152 million units from last year; however, the total market value is expected to grow by 6.1% year-on-year during the same period. 市场调研机构 Omdia 日前发布博文，数据显示，全球智能手机市场今年正出现「量跌价升」的结构性变化、今年全球智能手机出货量将同比下降 12.2% 至 10.93 亿部，较去年减少 1.52 亿部；但同期市场总价值预计同比增长 6.1%。

Omdia predicts that the average selling price of global smartphones will rise from $467 last year to $565 this year (approximately RMB 3842), an increase of $98, or about 21%, with both the price level and increase being historical highs for the industry. Omdia 预计，全球智能手机平均售价将从去年的 467 美元升至今年的 565 美元（约合人民币 3842 元），增加 98 美元，涨幅约 21%，售价水平及涨幅均为行业历史新高。

The main reason for the price increase comes from supply chain cost pressures. Omdia stated that the average prices of DRAM and NAND flash memory increased by over 80% quarter-on-quarter in the first quarter of this year, and continued to rise in the second quarter. 价格上涨的主要原因来自供应链成本压力。Omdia 表示，今年一季度 DRAM 和 NAND 闪存平均价格环比上涨超过 80%，二季度仍在继续上行。

Omdia also expects the global smartphone market contraction to continue until next year, but the decline in shipments will narrow to 0.9%. As manufacturing costs for smartphones under $100 are still difficult to significantly reduce, a substantial recovery in industry shipments is not expected until 2028. Omdia 还预计，全球智能手机市场收缩将延续至明年，但出货量降幅将收窄至 0.9%。由于 100 美元以下智能手机的制造成本仍难以显著下降，行业出货量的实质性恢复预计要到 2028 年才会开始。

item.title: SpaceX 股价下跌，马斯克身家回落至 9570 亿美元
item.guid: SpaceX-股价下跌，马斯克身家回落至-9570-亿美元
item.description:
The Bloomberg Billionaires Index shows that Elon Musk's personal net worth has fallen back to $957 billion, a decrease of $443 billion from its peak of approximately $1.4 trillion on June 16. 彭博亿万富豪指数显示，埃隆・马斯克个人净资产已回落至 9570 亿美元，较 6 月 16 日约 1.4 万亿美元的高点缩水 4430 亿美元。

Musk's wealth decline primarily stems from a drop in SpaceX's stock price. Bloomberg data shows that the book value of Musk's SpaceX shares is approximately $744 billion, accounting for nearly 80% of his total personal net worth; as of the close of trading on June 23 local time, SpaceX's stock price was $156, down more than 30% from its peak. 马斯克财富回落主要来自 SpaceX 股价下跌。彭博数据显示，马斯克所持 SpaceX 股份账面价值约 7440 亿美元，占其个人总净资产近八成；截至当地时间 6 月 23 日收盘，SpaceX 股价为 156 美元，较高点下跌超过 30%。

Musk still ranks first on the Bloomberg Billionaires Index. The index shows that second-place Larry Page has a net worth of approximately $297 billion, still more than $660 billion behind Musk. 马斯克仍位居彭博亿万富豪指数首位。该指数显示，第二名拉里・佩奇净资产约 2970 亿美元，与马斯克仍有 6600 亿美元以上差距。

item.title: 软银称已开始量产机器人，计划收购 ABB 机器人业务
item.guid: 软银称已开始量产机器人，计划收购-ABB-机器人业务
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, SoftBank Group Chairman Masayoshi Son revealed yesterday at a shareholders' meeting that robots for physical AI applications have begun mass production at a certain factory, and the product is about to be officially released. 据界面新闻报道，软银集团董事长孙正义昨日在股东大会上透露，面向物理 AI 应用的机器人已经在某工厂开始量产，产品即将正式发布。

He stated that SoftBank hopes to become the "overwhelming world's number one robotics company" by bringing together robotics companies from different vertical sectors. Masayoshi Son also mentioned that SoftBank plans to complete the acquisition of the robotics business of Swiss industrial group ABB in 2026. 他表示，软银希望通过汇聚不同垂直领域的机器人企业，成为「压倒性世界第一的机器人公司」。孙正义同时提到，软银计划在 2026 年完成对瑞士工业集团 ABB 旗下机器人业务的收购。

SoftBank acquired Boston Dynamics from Google in 2017, and subsequently sold its stake to Hyundai Motor Group starting in 2021. Bloomberg reported last year that SoftBank had agreed to acquire ABB's industrial robotics business for nearly $5.4 billion. 软银曾在 2017 年从 Google 手中收购波士顿动力，随后自 2021 年起陆续将持股出售给现代汽车集团。彭博社去年报道称，软银已同意以近 54 亿美元收购 ABB 工业机器人业务。

item.title: 连续包月 68 元起，豆包专业版正式上线
item.guid: 连续包月-68-元起，豆包专业版正式上线
item.description:
Doubao announced yesterday that Doubao Pro has officially launched, based on the Doubao 2.1 large model series, offering higher quotas and office task modes for complex work and productivity scenarios. 豆包昨日宣布，豆包专业版正式上线，基于豆包 2.1 系列大模型，面向复杂工作和生产力场景提供更高额度与办公任务模式。

    The standard continuous monthly package is 68 yuan, offering all benefits of the free version, and providing more than 5 times the quota for features like office tasks and expert mode;

    The enhanced continuous monthly package is 200 yuan, providing 4 times the quota of the standard package;

    The premium continuous monthly package is 500 yuan, providing 10 times the quota of the standard package.

The core new feature of Doubao Professional Edition is the integration of Doubao 2.1 Pro's office task mode. After user authorization, this mode can operate local computers and browsers to process local data, categorize files, handle documents, fill out forms, and collaborate across applications; it can also create, modify, and deploy website applications, supporting online application systems with backend databases. Free users can also experience the office task mode integrated with Doubao 2.1 Turbo. 豆包专业版的核心新增是接入豆包 2.1 Pro 的办公任务模式。该模式在用户授权后，可以操作本地电脑和浏览器，处理本地资料、归类文件、处理文档、填写表格和跨应用协作；也能创建、修改、部署网站应用，支持带后端数据库的在线应用系统。免费用户也可体验接入豆包 2.1 Turbo 的办公任务模式。

Doubao will also offer a 6-month student special event for university students, providing more free service quotas after verification; when purchasing the professional standard package, the continuous monthly student price is 38 yuan. 豆包还将面向在校大学生提供 6 个月学生特惠活动，认证后可获得更多免费服务额度；购买专业版标准套餐时，学生连续包月价为 38 元。

🔗 Related Reading: Hands-on review of Doubao Professional Edition, I'm willing to be among the first to pay 🔗 相关阅读： 实测豆包专业版，我愿意当第一批掏钱的人

item.title: 追觅俞浩：不会主动压低价格、希望把每个员工都培养成乔布斯
item.guid: 追觅俞浩：不会主动压低价格、希望把每个员工都培养成乔布斯
item.description:
Sina Tech reported that Yu Hao, founder of Dreame, stated yesterday at the 2026 Dalian Summer Davos Forum, when discussing the company's operating methods, that Dreame adheres to a high-end strategy. As long as they produce high-quality products, they dare to set high prices benchmarked against industry-leading standards. 新浪科技报道，追觅创始人俞浩昨日在 2026 大连夏季达沃斯论坛上谈到公司经营方法时表示，追觅坚持高端化路线，只要做出优质产品，就敢于对标行业顶尖水准制定高价。

We will never be a brand that actively lowers prices and disrupts the industry's pricing system.

He emphasized that the high-end strategy has allowed Dreame to open up all online and offline channels and simultaneously push the company to expand into global markets. 他强调，高端化路线让追觅得以打通线上、线下全渠道，并推动公司同步布局全球市场。

Yu Hao mentioned that Dreame's business currently covers 120 countries and regions, with over 10,000 offline physical outlets established overseas; overseas market revenue accounts for 80% of total revenue. 俞浩提到，追觅目前业务覆盖 120 个国家和地区，在海外布局了一万多个线下实体网点；海外市场收入占整体营收的 80%。

He also stated that the company has formed a mutually supportive business closed-loop by reducing costs through technology reuse, increasing revenue through global expansion, and boosting single-product profit through a high-end strategy. 他还表示，公司通过技术复用降低成本、全球化扩张拉高营收、高端化战略提升单品利润，形成了相互支撑的商业闭环。

Yu Hao also mentioned that the company has summarized hundreds of methodologies to help employees grow rapidly, with some post-90s employees already managing teams of thousands. He stated that Dreame hopes to cultivate every employee into a "Steve Jobs" and is willing to continuously increase engineers' income. 俞浩还提到，公司已总结出数百个方法论，用于帮助员工快速成长，部分 90 后员工已管理上千人团队。他表示， 追觅希望把每名员工培养成「乔布斯」 ，并愿意持续增加工程师收入。

item.title: 2.99 万元起，宇树 R1 人形机器人官宣降价
item.guid: 2.99-万元起，宇树-R1-人形机器人官宣降价
item.description:
Last night, Unitree Robotics announced that the official price of its bipedal humanoid robot Unitree R1 has been reduced from 39,900 yuan to starting from 29,900 yuan. 昨晚，宇树科技宣布旗下双足人形机器人 Unitree R1 官方售价由 3.99 万元下调至 2.99 万元起。

The R1 weighs 25 kg, is equipped with 26 high-precision joints, supports voice and image multi-modal large model interaction, and also provides development and customization capabilities for developers. R1 机身重量 25 千克，配备 26 个高精度关节，支持语音与图像多模态大模型交互，也面向开发者提供开发与定制能力。

item.title: 曝特斯拉中国车机将接入豆包
item.guid: 曝特斯拉中国车机将接入豆包
item.description:
According to Sina Tech, at ByteDance's recent Volcano Engine Origin Power Conference, Tesla China's in-car system confirmed its integration with the Doubao large model. 据新浪科技报道，在字节跳动日前举行的火山引擎原动力大会上，特斯拉中国车机确认接入豆包大模型。

The report cited blogger "Maizijun i" as saying that Tesla in mainland China will soon support controlling vehicles by waking up Doubao. Users can say "Hey, Tesla" or press the steering wheel voice button to activate the voice assistant. The relevant interaction logic and model capabilities will be technically supported by Doubao Assistant. 报道援引博主「麦子俊 i」的消息称，中国内地特斯拉将很快支持通过唤醒豆包来操控车辆，用户可喊出「嘿，特斯拉」或按下方向盘语音键启动语音助手。相关交互逻辑和模型能力将由豆包助手提供技术支持。

It is worth noting that there are reports that the Doubao AI assistant entry has appeared in the application list of Tesla's internal test software version 2026.14.11. 值得注意的是，有消息称在特斯拉内测软件版本 2026.14.11 的应用列表中，已出现豆包 AI 助手入口。

According to currently disclosed information, Doubao will primarily be responsible for vehicle control-related capabilities, including functions like air conditioning, windows, and navigation; DeepSeek will handle interactive scenarios such as casual chat and Q&A. 按照目前披露的信息，豆包将主要负责车辆控制相关能力，包括空调、车窗、导航等功能；DeepSeek 则负责闲聊问答等交互场景。

The report also mentioned that Tesla has deeply customized the relevant model capabilities to provide mainland Chinese car owners with an in-car AI experience similar to Grok, and is expected to support more intelligent vehicle command interactions. 报道还提到，特斯拉为相关模型能力进行了深度定制，使中国内地车主获得类似 Grok 的车机 AI 体验，并有望支持更智能的车辆指令交互。

item.title: 独立音乐平台 Jamendo 起诉英伟达用音乐数据训练音频模型
item.guid: 独立音乐平台-Jamendo-起诉英伟达用音乐数据训练音频模型
item.description:
Luxembourg independent music platform Jamendo yesterday sued Nvidia in a U.S. federal court in California, accusing the latter of unauthorized use of tens of thousands of tracks to train its audio AI models, seeking at least 17.8 million euros in damages . 卢森堡独立音乐平台 Jamendo 昨日向美国加利福尼亚州联邦法院起诉英伟达，指控后者未经授权使用数万首曲目训练音频 AI 模型，诉求包含 至少 1780 万欧元赔偿 。

The lawsuit alleges that Nvidia used the MTG-Jamendo dataset in the development of audio models such as Fugatto and Audio Flamingo. 诉状称，英伟达在 Fugatto、Audio Flamingo 等音频模型研发中使用了 MTG-Jamendo 数据集。

The dataset was jointly built by Jamendo and the Music Technology Group of Pompeu Fabra University in Barcelona, Spain. It contains approximately 55,600 tracks and metadata, and its external license is limited to non-commercial research and academic use. 该数据集由 Jamendo 与西班牙巴塞罗那庞培法布拉大学音乐技术研究组联合搭建，包含约 5.56 万首曲目和元数据，对外许可仅限非商用科研和学术用途。

Jamendo stated that Nvidia's public papers have listed MTG-Jamendo as one of the training datasets, but no commercial authorization has been reached between the two parties. Jamendo 表示，英伟达公开论文已经把 MTG-Jamendo 列为训练数据集之一，但双方没有达成商业授权。

item.title: 海力士拟赴美上市募资 294 亿美元，用于扩充 AI 内存产能
item.guid: 海力士拟赴美上市募资-294-亿美元，用于扩充-AI-内存产能
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Hynix plans to raise 45.45 trillion Korean Won, or approximately 29.4 billion US dollars, through a US listing to expand production capacity and meet the growing demand for AI-related memory chips. 据彭博社报道，海力士计划通过美国上市募资 45.45 万亿韩元，约合 294 亿美元，用于扩充产能，以应对 AI 相关内存芯片需求增长。

If calculated by fundraising scale, this deal would rank among the top five largest stock offerings in history, comparable in size to Saudi Aramco's 2019 IPO. 若按募资规模计算，这笔交易将跻身史上前五大股票发行之一，规模可与沙特阿美 2019 年 IPO 相比。

Bloomberg stated that as AI infrastructure construction accelerates, companies in related industrial chains are recently speeding up financing. Previously, SpaceX completed the largest IPO in history, and Alphabet also plans to raise 85 billion US dollars for AI-related investments. 彭博社称，随着 AI 基础设施建设提速，相关产业链公司近期正在加快融资。此前 SpaceX 已完成史上规模最大的 IPO，Alphabet 也计划筹集 850 亿美元用于 AI 相关投入。

item.title: 安克创新启动招股，最高募资 46.32 亿港元
item.guid: 安克创新启动招股，最高募资-46.32-亿港元
item.description:
Anker Innovations launched its prospectus on June 23rd and plans to list on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on July 2nd. The company intends to globally offer 46.6328 million Hong Kong shares, with a maximum offer price of HKD 99.32 per share, 100 shares per lot, raising a maximum of HKD 4.632 billion, equivalent to approximately RMB 4.011 billion. 安克创新已于 6 月 23 日启动招股，计划于 7 月 2 日在港交所上市。本次公司拟全球发售 4663.28 万股港股股份，每股招股价最高为 99.32 港元，每手 100 股，最高募资 46.32 亿港元，约合人民币 40.11 亿元。

The prospectus shows that Anker Innovations' revenues for 2023, 2024, and 2025 are RMB 17.5 billion, RMB 24.71 billion, and RMB 30.5 billion, respectively; gross profits for the same periods are RMB 7.48 billion, RMB 10.645 billion, and RMB 13.386 billion, with gross margins of 42.7%, 43.1%, and 43.9%, respectively. 招股书显示，安克创新 2023 年、2024 年和 2025 年营收分别为 175 亿元、247.1 亿元和 305 亿元；同期毛利分别为 74.8 亿元、106.45 亿元和 133.86 亿元，毛利率分别为 42.7%、43.1% 和 43.9%。

In the first quarter of this year, Anker Innovations' revenue was RMB 7.6 billion, a year-on-year increase of 27%; net profit was RMB 472 million, a year-on-year decrease of 4.87%; and non-recurring net profit was RMB 547 million, a year-on-year increase of 24%. 今年一季度，安克创新营收为 76 亿元，同比增长 27%；净利润为 4.72 亿元，同比下降 4.87%；扣非后净利润为 5.47 亿元，同比增长 24%。

item.title: 💡 EA 高管：AI 已提升工作室创造力，可减少开发流程阻力
item.guid: 💡-EA-高管：AI-已提升工作室创造力，可减少开发流程阻力
item.description:
According to Eurogamer, Laura Miele, President of EA's Enterprise Development, stated at the "Game Business Live" event during the recent Summer Game Fest that AI tools have brought "a real boost in creativity" to EA's studios, and some aspects may shorten game development cycles. 据 Eurogamer 报道，EA 企业发展总裁劳拉・米耶勒在日前 Summer Game Fest 期间的《Game Business Live》活动上表示，AI 工具已经在 EA 旗下工作室带来「真正的创造力提升」，部分环节或能缩短游戏开发周期。

When asked if the rise of AI tools would lead to shorter development cycles, Miele said that some aspects "might." She stated that she has always hoped to help studio developers reduce process friction and assist them in creating iconic works in their careers. 在被问及 AI 工具的兴起是否会带来更短开发周期时，米耶勒称，部分环节「或许会」。她表示，自己一直希望帮助工作室开发者减少流程阻力，并协助他们打造职业生涯中的代表性作品。

It's exciting that AI can help us reduce friction in pipelines, tools, and workflows. It removes some tedious work, and I've seen faster prototyping, faster creative output, and shorter, more efficient communication when aligning on ideas.

Miele stated that when some repetitive tasks are removed during the development process, creative work experiences "a real boost." 米耶勒称，当开发过程中部分重复性任务被移除后，创意工作会出现「真正的提升」。

item.title: 众筹价 2299 元起，小米 NAS 正式发布
item.guid: 众筹价-2299-元起，小米-NAS-正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi announced the launch of its first NAS product, "Xiaomi Smart Storage," which is now available for crowdfunding pre-order on Xiaomi Mall and Xiaomi Youpin. 昨天，小米宣布推出旗下首款 NAS 产品「Xiaomi 智能存储」，已在小米商城与小米有品开启众筹预约。

All Xiaomi Smart Storage devices feature a dual-bay design and are available in three versions: Xiaomi 智能存储均采用双盘位设计，共提供三个版本：

    Entry-level version with 4TB capacity (2TB×2), crowdfunding price of 2299 yuan, manufacturer's suggested retail price of 3499 yuan;

    Advanced version with 8TB capacity (4TB×2), crowdfunding price of 2899 yuan, suggested retail price of 4499 yuan;

    Professional version with 16TB capacity (8TB×2), crowdfunding price of 4699 yuan, suggested retail price of 6999 yuan.

item.title: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，接入 Slack 团队工作流
item.guid: Anthropic-推出-Claude-Tag，接入-Slack-团队工作流
item.description:
Anthropic yesterday released its enterprise collaboration tool, Claude Tag, which integrates with Slack, allowing users to directly @Claude in channels or discussions. Anthropic 昨日发布企业协作工具 Claude Tag，接入 Slack，用户可在频道或讨论中直接 @Claude。

Claude Tag can read current conversations and channel contexts, split tasks, and call tools to complete work such as data analysis, ticket organization, meeting minutes, action item breakdown, and converting code requirements into engineering tasks. Tasks can also progress over several hours or days, and once completed, it will return to Slack to notify relevant members for acceptance. Claude Tag 可读取当前对话和频道上下文，拆分任务并调用工具完成数据分析、工单整理、会议纪要、行动项拆解、代码需求转工程任务等工作。任务也可以跨越数小时或数天持续推进，完成后再回到 Slack 通知相关成员验收。

Anthropic stated that approximately 65% of the company's product code has been completed with the participation of Claude Tag. Anthropic 表示，公司约 65% 产品代码已经由 Claude Tag 参与完成。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Claude joined the group, and the boss no longer needs to @me 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Claude进群了，老板再也不用@我了

item.title: Qwen 发布首个原生语言世界模型 Qwen-AgentWorld
item.guid: Qwen-发布首个原生语言世界模型-Qwen-AgentWorld
item.description:
The Qwen team yesterday released Qwen-AgentWorld, which the official claims is the first native Language World Model (LWM). Qwen 团队昨日发布 Qwen-AgentWorld，官方称其为首个原生语言世界模型（LWM）。

It can predict how the environment will react after an AI agent performs an action, covering seven major domains: MCP, Search, Terminal, SWE, Web, OS, and Android, allowing a single model to simulate these interactive scenarios. 它能预测 AI 智能体执行某个操作后环境会作何反应，覆盖 MCP、Search、Terminal、SWE、Web、OS、Android 七大领域，用一个模型即可模拟这些交互场景。

In terms of performance, Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B achieved the highest overall score of 58.71 on the accompanying evaluation benchmark AgentWorldBench, surpassing GPT-5.4's 58.25; the open-source Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B scored 56.39, exceeding Claude Sonnet 4.6's 56.04. 性能方面，Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B 在配套评测基准 AgentWorldBench 上取得 58.71 的最高整体分，超过 GPT-5.4 的 58.25；本次开源的 Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B 得分 56.39，超过 Claude Sonnet 4.6 的 56.04。

💻 GitHub: github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld 💻 GitHub: github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/collections/Qwen/qwen-agentworld 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/collections/Qwen/qwen-agentworld

👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/collections/Qwen/Qwen-AgentWorld 👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/collections/Qwen/Qwen-AgentWorld

item.title: 曝腾讯测试企微 AI 助手「大元」
item.guid: 曝腾讯测试企微-AI-助手「大元」
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Tencent is testing an AI assistant in WeChat Work, attempting to combine enterprise collaboration scenarios with AI agent capabilities. 据彭博社报道，腾讯正在企业微信测试一款 AI 助手，试图把企业协作场景与 AI 智能体能力结合起来。

Zhang Jun, Tencent's head of public relations, posted on social media on Tuesday that the assistant, named "Dayuan," has begun a grayscale rollout to some users, and its underlying technology uses DeepSeek's latest V4 model. 腾讯公关负责人张军周二在社交媒体发文称，这款助手名为「大元」(Dayuan)，已开始向部分用户灰度，底层使用 DeepSeek 最新 V4 模型。

Users can interact with it using natural language, allowing it to read group chats, emails, and calendar information within WeChat Work, assisting with tasks such as analyzing customer feedback, compiling industry daily reports, and drafting weekly reports. 用户可以用自然语言与它交互，让它读取企业微信内的群聊、邮件和日程信息，辅助分析客户反馈、整理行业日报、起草周报等任务。

item.title: 网易有道开源 Confucius4-TTS，3 秒音频即可克隆音色
item.guid: 网易有道开源-Confucius4-TTS，3-秒音频即可克隆音色
item.description:
NetEase Youdao yesterday announced the launch of its "Ziyue 4.0" TTS speech synthesis engine, Confucius4-TTS. The official claims it is the industry's first open-source model that supports accent-free cross-lingual voice cloning for 14 languages without requiring reference text. 网易有道昨日宣布推出「子曰 4.0」TTS 语音合成引擎 Confucius4-TTS。官方称，这是业内首个支持 14 种语言跨语种无口音、且无需参考文本即可完成语音克隆的开源模型。

Confucius4-TTS supports zero-shot voice cloning. After a user provides 3 seconds of audio material, the model can complete voice cloning without reference text or prior training; the official states that the cloned voice's similarity to the original exceeds 85%, and the cloning task accuracy reaches 97%. Confucius4-TTS 支持零样本语音克隆。用户提供 3 秒音频素材后，无需参考文本和前期训练，模型即可完成音色克隆；官方称克隆音色与原声相似度超过 85%，克隆任务准确度达 97%。

The model supports 14 languages, including Chinese, English, Spanish, French, German, Korean, Thai, and Vietnamese. The official states that its key capability is cross-lingual pronunciation: after uploading Chinese audio, the AI can generate foreign language speech such as Japanese or English using that voice. 模型支持中文、英语、西班牙语、法语、德语、韩语、泰语、越南语等 14 种语言。官方称，其重点能力是跨语种发音：上传中文音频后，AI 可以用该音色生成日语、英语等外语语音。

💻 GitHub: github.com/netease-youdao/Confucius4-TTS 💻 GitHub: github.com/netease-youdao/Confucius4-TTS

item.title: 「开屏广告没了」登上热搜，百度地图、高德地图等被指已取消开屏广告
item.guid: 「开屏广告没了」登上热搜，百度地图、高德地图等被指已取消开屏广告
item.description:
Recently, "splash screen ads are gone" became a trending topic on Weibo. Many netizens and bloggers reported that apps like Baidu Maps, Amap, and NetEase Cloud Music have canceled their splash screen ads. 近期，「开屏广告没了」登上微博热搜。多位网友和博主反馈称，百度地图、高德地图、网易云音乐等 App 已取消开屏广告。

This discussion stemmed from a video previously posted by a blogger. The blogger claimed that while using a navigation app during driving, a "shake-to-open" splash screen ad was accidentally triggered by road bumps, causing the page to jump to a third-party platform and affecting driving safety. The controversy subsequently led to a concentrated discussion among users about issues such as splash screen ads, accidental jumps, and ad countdowns. 此次讨论源于一位博主此前发布的视频。该博主称，自己在驾驶过程中使用导航 App 时，因开屏「摇一摇」广告被路面颠簸误触，页面跳转至第三方平台，影响行车安全。相关争议随后引发用户对开屏广告、误触跳转和广告倒计时等体验问题的集中讨论。

Tests by "Beijing Daily" showed that among 20 commonly used shopping and social apps, 6 apps including Tieba, Weibo, Zhihu, Damai, and Mango TV still retain splash screen ads; while 14 apps such as Taobao, JD.com, Xiaohongshu, Pinduoduo, Xianyu, Douyin, and Dianping no longer display splash screen ads and can directly enter the homepage after opening. 《北京日报》的测试显示，在 20 款常用购物、社交类 App 中，贴吧、微博、知乎、大麦、芒果 TV 等 6 款 App 仍保留开屏广告；淘宝、京东、小红书、拼多多、闲鱼、抖音、大众点评等 14 款 App 则已看不到开屏广告，点开后可直接进入主页。

item.title: 亚马逊首次在 ChatGPT 投放广告，仍拒绝向 AI 开放购物数据
item.guid: 亚马逊首次在-ChatGPT-投放广告，仍拒绝向-AI-开放购物数据
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Amazon has started placing ads on ChatGPT, becoming one of the most prominent retailers to appear in OpenAI's emerging advertising business. These ads will direct users back to Amazon's own marketplace, where Amazon controls the shopping experience and transaction process. 据《商业内幕》报道，亚马逊已开始在 ChatGPT 上投放广告，成为出现在 OpenAI 新兴广告业务中最受关注的零售商之一。相关广告会将用户引导回亚马逊自有商城，由亚马逊掌控购物体验和交易环节。

E-commerce analyst Juozas Kaziukėnas stated that this move is "symbolic" because Amazon had previously largely not participated in AI shopping initiatives that allowed third-party chatbots and AI agents to aggregate its product, pricing, and inventory data. 电商分析师 Juozas Kaziukėnas 表示，此举具有「象征意义」，因为亚马逊此前基本没有参与那些允许第三方聊天机器人和 AI 智能体聚合其商品、价格与库存数据的 AI 购物计划。

Screenshots posted by Kaziukėnas on LinkedIn this Monday show that when users search for coffee machines, ChatGPT recommends several products, followed by an Amazon sponsored ad titled "Top-Rated Kitchen Gear". Kaziukėnas 本周一通过 LinkedIn 发布的截图显示，当用户搜索咖啡机时，ChatGPT 会推荐数款产品，随后附上一条标题为「Top-Rated Kitchen Gear」的亚马逊赞助广告。

However, the report also points out a contradiction in Amazon's AI strategy: the company is willing to pay to reach ChatGPT's vast user base, yet it continues to protect its own shopping data, restricting AI systems from accessing and using this data. 不过，报道也指出亚马逊 AI 策略中的矛盾：公司愿意付费触达 ChatGPT 庞大的用户群体，却仍在保护自有购物数据，限制 AI 系统访问和使用这些数据。

Amazon has previously taken multiple measures to restrict AI crawling and data collection. Kaziukėnas stated that last year Amazon stopped providing product feeds to Google Shopping and updated its code to block several crawlers, including OpenAI; earlier this year, Amazon also won a court order to block Perplexity's AI agent. 亚马逊此前已采取多项措施限制 AI 抓取和数据采集。Kaziukėnas 称，去年亚马逊停止向 Google Shopping 提供商品信息流，并更新代码以屏蔽包括 OpenAI 在内的多个爬虫；今年早些时候，亚马逊还赢得一项法院命令，得以阻止 Perplexity 的 AI 智能体。

item.title: 是枝裕和新片《盒子里的羊》发布首支正式预告
item.guid: 是枝裕和新片《盒子里的羊》发布首支正式预告
item.description:
According to The Hollywood Reporter, Neon has released the first official trailer for Japanese director Hirokazu Kore-eda's new film, "Sheep in the Box". 据《好莱坞报道者》消息，Neon 发布日本导演是枝裕和新片《盒子里的羊》首支正式预告。

The film is set in a Japan halfway into the future: drone delivery, widespread electric vehicles, and generative AI have entered home life. A couple welcomes an AI child who looks like a little boy; during the day, he plays like a normal child, plants trees, and reads "The Little Prince", while at night he returns to his charging dock and powers off. 影片设定在半步进入未来的日本：无人机配送、电动车普及，生成式 AI 已经进入家庭生活。一对夫妇迎来一个外形像小男孩的 AI 孩子，他白天像普通孩子一样玩耍、种树、读《小王子》，夜晚则坐回充电座关机。

"Sheep in the Box" is Hirokazu Kore-eda's 17th feature film and was nominated for the main competition unit at this year's Cannes Film Festival. Kore-eda won the Palme d'Or at Cannes in 2018 for "Shoplifters". The film will be released in New York and Los Angeles on July 24. 《Sheep in the Box》是是枝裕和第 17 部剧情长片，今年曾入围戛纳电影节主竞赛单元。是枝裕和曾凭《小偷家族》获得 2018 年戛纳金棕榈奖。该片将于 7 月 24 日在纽约和洛杉矶上映。

item.title: Netflix 发布《海贼王》重制版海报
item.guid: Netflix-发布《海贼王》重制版海报
item.description:
Netflix yesterday released the poster for "The One Piece", a remastered animated series of "One Piece". The series will start from the beginning of the story, "setting sail on the Grand Line with Luffy from the very start". Netflix 昨日发布《海贼王》动画剧集重制版《The One Piece》海报。该剧集将从故事起点展开，「与路飞一起从起点开始扬帆大航海」。

"The One Piece" is produced by WIT Studio and is scheduled to launch on Netflix in February next year. The project is positioned as a remastered version of the "One Piece" animated series, re-exploring the early adventures of the original work. 《The One Piece》由 WIT Studio 制作，计划于明年 2 月在 Netflix 上线。该项目定位为《海贼王》动画剧集的重制版，围绕原作早期冒险重新展开。
